en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO LILIES. A TESTIMONY. OF ASAPH, A PSALM. Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, you who lead Joseph like a flock! You who are enthroned upon the cherubim, shine forth.
zh: 以色列的牧者啊！帶領約瑟好像帶領羊群的啊！ 求你留心聽； 坐在基路伯上面的啊！ 求你顯出榮光。

en: Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up your might and come to save us!
zh: 在以法蓮、便雅憫和瑪拿西面前， 求你施展你的大能， 前來拯救我們。

en: Restore us, O God; let your face shine, that we may be saved!
zh: 神啊，求你使我們復興！ 願你的臉光照我們，我們就可以得救。

en: O LORD God of hosts, how long will you be angry with your people's prayers?
zh: 耶和華萬軍之 神啊！ 你因你子民的禱告發怒，要到幾時呢？

en: You have fed them with the bread of tears and given them tears to drink in full measure.
zh: 你使他們以眼淚當餅吃， 使他們喝滿杯的淚水。

en: You make us an object of contention for our neighbors, and our enemies laugh among themselves.
zh: 你使我們的鄰國因我們紛爭， 我們的仇敵也譏笑我們。

en: Restore us, O God of hosts; let your face shine, that we may be saved!
zh: 萬軍的 神啊！求你使我們復興； 願你的臉光照我們，我們就可以得救。

en: You brought a vine out of Egypt; you drove out the nations and planted it.
zh: 你從埃及帶走一棵葡萄樹， 你趕出外族人，把這樹栽上。

en: You cleared the ground for it; it took deep root and filled the land.
zh: 你為它預備了地土， 它就深深扎根，充滿全地。

en: The mountains were covered with its shade, the mighty cedars with its branches.
zh: 它的蔭影遮蓋了群山， 它的枝條遮蓋了高大的香柏樹。

en: It sent out its branches to the sea and its shoots to the River.
zh: 它的枝條伸展，直到大海； 它的幼苗，直到大河。

en: Why then have you broken down its walls, so that all who pass along the way pluck its fruit?
zh: 你為甚麼拆毀它的籬笆， 任由所有過路的人採摘呢？

en: The boar from the forest ravages it, and all that move in the field feed on it.
zh: 從樹林中出來的野豬踐踏它， 田野的走獸把它吃了。

en: Turn again, O God of hosts! Look down from heaven, and see; have regard for this vine,
zh: 萬軍的 神啊！求你回心轉意， 從天上垂看鑒察， 眷顧這葡萄樹，

en: the stock that your right hand planted, and for the son whom you made strong for yourself.
zh: 眷顧你右手栽種的根， 和你為自己培育的兒子。

en: They have burned it with fire; they have cut it down; may they perish at the rebuke of your face!
zh: 這樹已被火燒，被砍下； 他們因你臉上的怒容滅亡。

en: But let your hand be on the man of your right hand, the son of man whom you have made strong for yourself!
zh: 願你的手護庇你右邊的人， 就是你為自己培育的人。

en: Then we shall not turn back from you; give us life, and we will call upon your name!
zh: 這樣，我們就不退後離開你； 求你救活我們，我們就要求告你的名。

en: Restore us, O LORD God of hosts! let your face shine, that we may be saved!
zh: 耶和華萬軍的 神啊！求你使我們復興； 願你的臉光照我們，我們就可以得救。
